dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My body... it was giving up. Terminal stomach cancer. Only a few months left.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Min-hwan... where are you?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Even on my last days... I'm alone.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I mustered all my strength, just to go home. To see him. To be with him one last time.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KEY JINGLE, DOOR CREAK

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: What's that sound...?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: MOAN, GASP (from inside)

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Min-hwan...?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRASH (something falls inside)

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: No... it can't be.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DOOR SWINGS OPEN

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Park Min-hwan! Jung Soo-min!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: Ji-won?! What are you doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Jung Soo-min
dialogue.line: Oh my god, Ji-won! It's not what it looks like!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: My best friend... my husband... naked... in my bed.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: How... how could you?!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: Why are you home so early? You should be in the hospital!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: So you could do this?! While I'm dying?!

dialogue.speaker: Jung Soo-min
dialogue.line: Ji-won, please, it's a misunderstanding! He forced me!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Lies. All lies. Her eyes... they're full of triumph.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Forced you? You've been eyeing him for years, haven't you, Soo-min?!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: Enough! What's the big deal? You're going to die anyway! I need someone to take care of me!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: He said it. He actually said it.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: You... you monster! All this time... you were just waiting for me to die so you could get my insurance money!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: And what if I was?! You're useless! A burden! You're just a walking corpse!

dialogue.speaker: Jung Soo-min
dialogue.line: Min-hwan, don't say that!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: You two... you deserve each other! I hate you! I hate you both!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SLAP!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: How dare you hit me, you dying hag!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: You want to die faster?! Fine!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PUSH, STUMBLE

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He pushed me. Hard. My head hit the marble table.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD, CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: G-gasp...

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: The pain... it's blinding. My blood... so warm.

dialogue.speaker: Jung Soo-min
dialogue.line: Min-hwan! What have you done?!

dialogue.speaker: Park Min-hwan
dialogue.line: She deserved it! She was going to tell everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: My life... ending like this? Betrayed by everyone... I just wanted to be happy...

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: If only... if only I could go back. I would never make the same mistakes. I would never marry him. I would never trust her.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GURGLE, LAST BREATH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Darkness consumed me. The bitter taste of betrayal, the sting of regret... my last sensations.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASP, COUGH (sudden, sharp intake of breath)

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: H-huh?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: What is this? I'm... I'm breathing?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The dull ache in my head... it was gone. The smell of antiseptic... replaced by something familiar. My old room.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: This isn't... the hospital. This isn't... my apartment.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE (of bedsheets)

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: My body... it feels different. Lighter. Younger.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I rushed to the mirror. A face I hadn't seen in years stared back. My younger self. No gaunt cheeks, no sickly pallor.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: My hair... it's long. My skin... clear.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Is this... a dream? Am I dead? Is this hell?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Then I saw it. The calendar on the wall. The date. April 12, 2013.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: 2013...? No... it can't be. That was... ten years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Ten years ago... before I married Min-hwan. Before I got sick. Before everything went wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: I... I went back in time?

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: This is my chance. My second chance. I won't let them destroy me again.

dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-won
dialogue.line: Park Min-hwan... Jung Soo-min... you will pay. I will marry my husband... but it won't be *my* husband.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FIST CLENCH

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A cold, burning resolve ignited within me. The game had just begun.

summary: Kang Ji-won, dying of cancer, discovers her husband Park Min-hwan is having an affair with her best friend Jung Soo-min. After a confrontation, she is murdered by her husband, only to wake up ten years in the past, granted a second chance at life and revenge.
